title: hieracium microtum subsp. microtum
intro: Hieracium microtum subsp. microtum, also known as Small Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is a perennial herb with yellow dandelion-like flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and may help to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and aid in wound healing. Traditionally, the plant's roots and leaves have been used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
